title: Pricing and Margin Management
shortSummary: How to price for value, protect margin, and avoid growing revenue that quietly destroys cash.
whyItMatters: Pricing is one of the highest-leverage financial decisions a founder makes. A small pricing improvement compounds across every sale, while weak margins make growth harder to fund.
coreConcepts: Price sets the ceiling for gross margin and the economics of growth
Discounting without rules trains customers to expect lower value
Contribution margin matters because revenue alone does not tell you what cash the business keeps
Pricing reviews should connect customer value, market context, and runway pressure
